title: (I Can't Get No) Satisfaction
why_this_song: (I Can't Get No) Satisfaction by The Rolling Stones (1965) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: 'Cause I try, and I try, and I try, and I try
I can't get no, I can't get no
No satisfaction, no satisfaction, no satisfaction

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "can't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "can't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "satisfaction" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "satisfaction" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Rolling Stones one question about "(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Rolling Stones sobre "(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction", o que aconteceria?
